issuer: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund Ltd.
notes: Issuer, exemption, and minimum investment are anchored to SEC Form D. RWA.xyz identifies BlackRock as manager, Securitize as platform, U.S. Qualified Purchaser eligibility, management fee range, and Total Asset Value. Financial Times reports Securitize as transfer agent/tokenization platform/placement agent and BNY Mellon as custodian of T-bills. Auditor, administrator, and attestation provider were not found in public sources listed in source-discovery.md, so they remain null. A secondary WSJ source reports a $5,000,000 minimum for qualified purchasers via Securitize, but this file uses the SEC Form D minimum investment of $100,000 because it is the higher-priority official filing.
